ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "mtfcc" TEXT /* MTFCC code representing the county type */,
  "oid" TEXT /* OID for the county object */,
  "geoid" TEXT /* Geographic identifier for the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State code */,
  "county" TEXT /* County name */,
  "county_ns" TEXT /* County namespace */,
  "basename" TEXT /* Base name for the county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the county */,
  "lsadc" INTEGER /* LSADC code */,
  "func_stat" TEXT /* Functional status of the county */,
  "county_cc" TEXT /* County code */,
  "area_land" REAL /* Land area of the county in square units */,
  "area_water" REAL /* Water area of the county in square units */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Object ID */,
  "cent_lat" REAL /* Central latitude of the county */,
  "cent_lon" REAL /* Central longitude of the county */,
  "intpt_lat" REAL /* Internal point latitude of the county */,
  "intpt_lon" REAL /* Internal point longitude of the county */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric representation of the county (polygon) */,
  "population_total" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square unit) */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Type of primary land use (e.g., residential, commercial, agricultural) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the county data was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the county data was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the county data */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the county data */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the state_info table to link counties to states */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_info ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the demographic data belongs to */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage representing a demographic statistic */,
  "lower_limit" REAL /* Lower limit of the demographic statistic */,
  "upper_limit" REAL /* Upper limit of the demographic statistic */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "demographic_type" TEXT /* Type of demographic data (e.g., age group, ethnicity, income) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the demographic data (e.g., male, female, non-binary) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the demographic data (e.g., 0-18, 19-35, 36-60, 61+) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race or ethnicity of the demographic data */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total count of people in the demographic group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the demographic data was updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_info" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., MT for Montana) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Total land area of the state in square units */,
  "water_area" REAL /* Total water area of the state in square units */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the state data was updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last updated the state data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)
